objectives: Comprehensive code quality review of all 22 crates in k2payments Rust workspace
Produce structured report: Critical Issues, Recommendations, Suggestions, Positive Findings
constraints: All 22 crates reviewed across multiple prior context windows
Context reconstructed from prior agent JSON files
important_facts: All source files across 22 crates have been fully read

Prior CRITICAL issues from earlier passes are confirmed FIXED: SqliteStore panic, std::sync::RwLock in async, TCP OOM, internal error forwarding, DB URL in health endpoint, HKDF KDF, Debug key leak, XML injection
New CRITICAL issues found this pass: decode_time unsound cast (postgres + rocksdb), silent AuthMode::Disabled fallback in main.rs, TOCTOU double pipeline lookup in app.rs
5 copies of encode_time function exist across the codebase (DRY violation)
Dead middleware infrastructure in admin crate
Outcome enum duplicated in runtime-core and store crates
PipelineSection::timeout_ms parsed but never enforced anywhere
decisions_made: Report written with severity tiers: CRITICAL, HIGH, RECOMMENDATION, SUGGESTION, POSITIVE
Each issue cited with exact file:line reference
risks_issues: decode_time unsound cast: negative i64 timestamp wraps to large u64 — data corruption risk in prod: open
Silent AuthMode::Disabled fallback: misconfigured auth mode silently opens admin API: open
TOCTOU pipeline lookup: pipeline could hot-reload between reads in app.rs: open
encode_time duplicated 5x: next copy will diverge: open
timeout_ms field parsed but never enforced: configuration dead weight: open

iteration.summary: Completed full read of all 22 crates in the mx20022 Rust workspace. Identified 3 new CRITICAL issues not in prior passes (unsound decode_time cast, silent auth mode fallback, TOCTOU pipeline lookup), plus numerous recommendations and suggestions. All previously identified CRITICAL issues from prior passes are confirmed fixed. Report delivered below.
outputs_produced: Comprehensive code quality review report (delivered in assistant response)
next_actions: Fix decode_time unsound cast in postgres and rocksdb store backends
Fix silent AuthMode fallback in main.rs build_admin_auth
Fix TOCTOU in app.rs process() double pipeline lookup

mentions.relevance_note: Security agent confirmed HKDF salt issue in crypto crate; CR agent adds context: salt is derived from secret key rather than being a fixed domain separator
Architecture agent flagged Outcome enum duplication; CR agent confirms map_outcome function in application.rs is pure boilerplate caused by this
Test agent found zero tests in rocksdb and cli crates; CR agent confirms rocksdb has no test for decode_time unsound path
